question: How many heroes were published by Marvel Comics?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM superhero AS s INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

question: Show hero count by gender for Marvel Comics.
expected_sql: SELECT g.gender AS hero_gender, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM superhero AS s INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id INNER JOIN gender AS g ON s.gender_id = g.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' GROUP BY g.gender

question: Show hero count by eye color for Marvel Comics.
expected_sql: SELECT c.colour AS eye_colour, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM superhero AS s INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id INNER JOIN colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' GROUP BY c.colour

question: Show hero count by publisher for blue-eyed heroes.
expected_sql: SELECT p.publisher_name AS publisher_name, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM superhero AS s INNER JOIN colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' GROUP BY p.publisher_name

question: Show hero count by race for DC Comics.
expected_sql: SELECT r.race AS hero_race, COUNT(*) AS metric_value FROM superhero AS s INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id INNER JOIN race AS r ON s.race_id = r.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' GROUP BY r.race

question: How many powered heroes were male and had Super Strength?
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hp.hero_id) AS metric_value FROM hero_power AS hp INNER JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN gender AS g ON s.gender_id = g.id WHERE g.gender = 'Male' AND sp.power_name = 'Super Strength'

question: Show powered hero count by publisher for Flight.
expected_sql: SELECT p.publisher_name AS publisher_name, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.hero_id) AS metric_value FROM hero_power AS hp INNER JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE sp.power_name = 'Flight' GROUP BY p.publisher_name

question: Show powered hero count by eye color for Agility.
expected_sql: SELECT c.colour AS eye_colour, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.hero_id) AS metric_value FROM hero_power AS hp INNER JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id WHERE sp.power_name = 'Agility' GROUP BY c.colour

question: Show powered hero count by hair color for Super Strength.
expected_sql: SELECT c.colour AS hair_colour, COUNT(DISTINCT hp.hero_id) AS metric_value FROM hero_power AS hp INNER JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN colour AS c ON s.hair_colour_id = c.id WHERE sp.power_name = 'Super Strength' GROUP BY c.colour

question: Show average attribute value by attribute name for Marvel Comics.
expected_sql: SELECT a.attribute_name AS attribute_name, AVG(ha.attribute_value) AS metric_value FROM hero_attribute AS ha INNER JOIN attribute AS a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON ha.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' GROUP BY a.attribute_name

question: Show average attribute value and attributed hero count by attribute name for Female heroes.
expected_sql: SELECT a.attribute_name AS attribute_name, AVG(ha.attribute_value) AS hero_attribute_value_avg, COUNT(DISTINCT ha.hero_id) AS attributed_hero_count FROM hero_attribute AS ha INNER JOIN attribute AS a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON ha.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN gender AS g ON s.gender_id = g.id WHERE g.gender = 'Female' GROUP BY a.attribute_name

question: Show average attribute value by publisher for Intelligence.
expected_sql: SELECT p.publisher_name AS publisher_name, AVG(ha.attribute_value) AS metric_value FROM hero_attribute AS ha INNER JOIN attribute AS a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id INNER JOIN superhero AS s ON ha.hero_id = s.id INNER JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Intelligence' GROUP BY p.publisher_name
